feed.title: SAP Community - SAP ERP
feed.subtitle: SAP ERP Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Extending Process Purchase Requisition(F1048A) app for Business need
entry.content:
Application Component : MM-FIO-PUR-REQ-SOC

 

Our Business requirement is to enable “Create Purchase order” button all the time for all PR’s in the list irrespective of the PR Type(Blocked, restrict). 

 

We have tried enabling the Create Purchase Order button by going for Adaptation project but this option is disabled.

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Error when setting the deletion flag
entry.content:
Hello

We want to use report PPARCHP1 to set a deletion flag on a production order. The job terminates with the error message

Entry 000093799376 0001 000000000000 already exists
Message no. 26275

 

The same error occurs if you want to set this manually directly in the order.

entry.title: How can I made a mass upload for materials in the transaction CJ20N?
entry.content:
Dear All:

I would Like to know how to upload a mass list of material created in excel_file, to the transaction #CJ20N.
Any recomendation or guidences would be very appreciate.
BR

Rocio

#

entry.title: How to configure & view the ESOP amount to display in Form 16 & in which section ? Need urgent help
entry.content: Hi. I have a wagetype configured for maintaining ESOP amount in Infotype 15 . It is reflecting in Annual Perk but not in Form 16 of the employee ? How to do this ?

entry.title: Understanding SAP Wage Type Mapping
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I'm seeking information on SAP wage types. Can you guide me on where to find a table, view, report, or configuration that shows how these wage types are mapped to categories such as Total Deductions, Gross Pay, and Basic Pay?

I'm a consultant, not an SAP user, and I'm looking to understand how employee pay elements (wage types) are classified and how salaries are calculated in SAP.

Thank you for your help.

entry.title: startup.bat is not recognized as an internal or external command operable program or batch file
entry.content: startup.bat" is not recognized as an internal or external command operable program or batch file while doing sum tool.

entry.title: Mass - Sales Scheduling agreement
entry.content:
Hello All, 

we have more than 200 sales scheduling agreements required to change delivery schedule number for all scheduling agreements. 

Please advise how to change delivery schedule number for all more than 200 scheduling agreements at a time? in MASS transaction, there is no object for sales scheduling agreement.

Thanks & Regards,

Venkat.

entry.title: How is the value for the BMENG (confirmed quantity) field from E1STKOM picked up in the BOMMAT IDoc?
entry.content: How is the value for the BMENG (confirmed quantity) field from E1STKOM segment is pickup in the BOMMAT IDoc ? from where it is picking value as STKO has BMENG field which is Base quantity field.And in IDoc segment E1STKOM it is with name Confirmed quantity

entry.title: MD67 Split number of weeks
entry.content:
Dear SAP experts,

I have an issue with automatic split of PIRs. i have maintained settings below and expect that after MD67 run I'll have first 7 months split into weekly requirements and first 8 weeks split into daily requirement.

 

But after MD67 run (on December 2nd 2024) this is what i get. Look like 8 weeks were split as expected, but then monthly split stopped in April way earlier than it should.

Am i misunderstanding how MD67 works?

entry.title: Enable of Park Post facility in SAP
entry.content:
We are enabling RPA in manual JV because in SAP in Tcode ZFB03 there is no facility of Park and post.
The benefit of RPA is that because of RPA there will be Park Post facility and for multiple line items approval a single approval will be send to approver and approver will approve it and get automatic posted in SAP. 
 
I am convincing my team to not to adopt RPA and instead of it enable the system of Park and Post in SAP only.
 
Kindly reply me is it possible to enable park post facility in ZFB03 as it will save our cost of RPA implementation.

entry.title: Can't remove free article in tick box
entry.content:
In ME21N or ME22N, i want to untick free article since article has a Purchase price on inforecord level,

But ticking comes back as i save purchase order,

How can I solve this?

txs,

sophie

entry.title: Remediation step on weak TLS vulnerability
entry.content:
I need on how to remediate system vulnerability reported by our VA tool. It is related to TLS. The step suggested by the tool is very general and not specific for SAP ECC on Suse Linux environment. Please find the attached file for detailed vulnerability.

 

Regards,

 

Zaharah


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Is it possible to create the e-invoice for "Evaluated Receipt Settlement (ERS)" with e-document
entry.content:
Hello everyone!
We have made the eDocument customizing for source document type SD_INVOICE and the outgoing invoices are created as e-invoices and listed in the eDocument Cockpit (EDOC_COCKPIT).

Has anyone already made the customizing for the "Evaluated Receipt Settlement (ERS)" procedure?
Which source document type must be activated in the customizing point "Activate Source Type Documents for Company Code" and which eDocument type must be maintained in the Customizing point “Assign eDocument Type to Invoice Verification Transaction”?

I hope that there is a solution for this.
Thank you very much
Greetings Jens Witten

entry.title: RPA error in Manual JV
entry.content:
Our company have implemented RPA on manual JV but from users feedback I get to know that they are facing error issue as in Manual JV RPA user make a excel file and upload in the RPA software then RPA sent it to the approver and approver approves it and after that it is attached with SAP and transaction get posted in SAP but if there is any error even special character error then user need to repeat the whole process again.

Can we make it possible that if there is any error we get about it at first time before approval so that approver and user time can be saved but the team who have developed the RPA told me that they cannot do the same because there is SAP in the backend and if there is SAP error SAP reads this so if we apply these validations in the front end then then our RPA get too  much slow and it is not possible to do so.

Please reply me as if anyone knows about how we can apply the validations at first input check.

entry.title: issuance slip has wrong UAM of BULK instead of Nos it displays Tab
entry.content:
in the Goods issuance slip UOM shows wrong unit of measurement instead of NOS it shows TAB .

can any one help how to resolve

entry.title: Problems when exporting result in F110
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am not able to download the result of transaction F110 into a folder of a shared network.

Once a get the result in F110, I go to Menu -> List -> Export -> Local File... 

Then I click on the file extension

I select the folder in the shared network and the file name I want to replace or generate


And after click on "replace" or "generate" SAP isn't working anymore and crashes.

 

I can save the result on other devices (different to the shared network). It's like the machines is having trouble accessing that device, but I can manually create and modify files in this path using File explorer.
I have tried this on other machines with my own SAP account and it worked.
Other users who do not have this problem have tried it on my machine with their own SAP accounts and it has failed too.
 
I have also tried to add the path manually to the Security Configuration in SAP Logon options, but there was no luck

I wonder if anyone has any clues about what might be wrong here.

 

Thanks in advance

 

Kind regards

Maria

entry.title: Stock Valuation split of Mat. Lab. Ovhd.
entry.content: SAP Business One How can I get a stock value report showing material, labour, overhead

entry.title: LPK 2- Change Log
entry.content:
Hello SAP gurus,

Where can I see the change history of contol cycles ? The target is to find which user has changed the fields in LPK2

entry.title: why official document numbering is required in MIRO?
entry.content:
Hello all,

Self-billing has been activated for some vendors /french companies in our system. The process is working according to expectations, using official numbering of invoices, according to french regulation. 

However, when a vendor with active official numbering (LFM2-XERSY populated) is used for a company with ERS EU range populated (T001Z-PAVAL), even if there is no ERS agreement for the vendor within this company, the system generates an error (8A827) during MIRO, requiring us to manage a range for official documents for the vendor/company (in transaction J1AB).

Is this normal ? How can we avoid this ? Especially this is causing issues to business :

  • need to manage unneeded ranges for combinations of vendor/company in J1AB
  • vendor reference set, by business, during MIRO in RBKP-XBLNR, is replaced by official numbering, while the invoice is not an ERS one and vendor reference is lost
  • in the futur, if an ERS agreement is signed for the vendor / plant of the company, ERS invoices will start at an advanced number, confusing the vendor and without be sure about legal validity of this numbering. 

Please advice.

PS: we are in ECC6.

##MIRO; RBKP-XBLNR; ##OfficialNumberin

Thank you in advance

Best regards

Soumeya

entry.title: Is there any method can upload and post API bank statement to meet Japan local requirement?
entry.content:
I am facing a problem while implementing a project in Japan. To satisfy the customer's requirements, we need to upload the bank statement via an API form and post it. However, it seems that the standard S/4 HANA Cloud does not provide an API form for bank statement uploads.

Can anyone help me or provide instructions on how to handle this?

I would greatly appreciate your assistance.
